requirement_topic.en: Transport — UN 38.3 and Chile Import Logistics

summary.en: Lithium batteries and power banks must be handled as dangerous goods for transport planning and documentation, with UN 38.3 evidence for the model and packaging, including port and carrier acceptance conditions at likely Chile entry ports such as Valparaiso and San Antonio.
summary.zh: 锂电池和移动电源在运输中需按危险货物进行计划和文件管理，并提供面向具体型号与包装的UN 38.3证据，结合入境口岸（如瓦尔帕莱索、圣安东尼奥）及承运人验收要求。
summary.zht: 鋰電池和行動電源在運輸中需按危險貨物進行計畫和文件管理，並提供面向具體型號與包裝的UN 38.3證據，結合入境口岸（如瓦爾巴萊索、聖安東尼奧）及承運人驗收要求。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3
UN model dangerous-goods transport framework used by air and sea carriers
Chile logistics acceptance and customs documentary checks at entry ports

summary.en: China exporters usually maintain UN 38.3 test reports, SDS/MSDS, and transport pack documentation. These are necessary for outbound logistics and often reused, but they are only the base layer of Chile-bound transport compliance.
summary.zh: 中国出口商通常具备UN 38.3测试报告、SDS/MSDS及运输包装文件，这些有助于出境物流并常可复用，但只构成智利运输合规的基础层。
summary.zht: 中國出口商通常具備UN 38.3測試報告、SDS/MSDS及運輸包裝文件，這些有助於出境物流並常可複用，但只構成智利運輸合規的基礎層。

standards_or_laws: China GB 1948 hazard logistics and dangerous goods support documents
UN 38.3 report model used for export shipments
Air and sea freight dangerous goods documentation rules used by freight forwarders

gap.en: The exporter gap is that UN 38.3 documents are model-specific and can become non-compliant if chemistry, cell format, or packaging design changes. Chile-bound shipments additionally need carrier/port checks and importer coordination at Chile logistics nodes.
gap.zh: 差距在于UN 38.3证据具有型号依赖性，若化学体系、单体结构或包装设计变更即失效。面向智利运输还需要承运人和口岸验收以及进口商物流协同。
gap.zht: 差距在於UN 38.3證據具有型號依賴性，若化學體系、單體結構或包裝設計變更即失效。面向智利運輸還需要承運人和口岸驗收以及進口商物流協同。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for lithium battery logistics; transport evidence is essential for dangerous-goods handling and port acceptance.
mandatory_status.cn: Dangerous-goods logistics documentation is commonly mandatory for China exporters and remains essential for Chile-bound goods as baseline evidence.

source.publisher: United Nations Economic Commission for Europe (UNECE), UN Manual of Tests and Criteria

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A UN 38.3 report remains necessary for lithium products, but Chile entry still depends on port logistics controls and importer-side dangerous-goods handling readiness.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] UN 38.3报告仍是必要文件，但智利入境还取决于口岸物流控制和进口商危险品处理准备。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] UN 38.3報告仍是必要文件，但智利入境還取決於口岸物流控制和進口商危險品處理準備。
